content:
# Best AI Tools for Video Editing in 2026

Video editing used to be time-consuming and require expensive software, but AI tools have changed everything!

Check out our [[link:/category/Video|Video category]] for more video tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/51|VEED]]: Easy Online Video Editing

[[link:/tools/51|VEED]] is perfect for beginners and pros alike, with powerful AI features right in your browser.

### VEED's AI Features
- **Auto-captions**: Generate accurate captions in seconds
- **AI background removal**: Change or remove backgrounds easily
- **Text-to-speech**: Add professional voiceovers
- **Magic Cut**: Auto-create short videos from long footage

---

## [[link:/tools/201|Pictory]]: Turn Text into Video

[[link:/tools/201|Pictory]] is amazing for turning blog posts, scripts, or even audio into engaging videos automatically.

### Pictory for Video Creation
- **Text-to-video**: Paste your text and get a video
- **AI voiceovers**: 100+ realistic voices
- **Stock media library**: Access to millions of images and videos

---

## [[link:/tools/9|Runway]]: Hollywood-Grade AI Effects

[[link:/tools/9|Runway]] offers advanced AI features that used to be only available in big-budget studios.

---

## Comparison Table

| Tool | Best For | Price |
|------|----------|-------|
| [[link:/tools/51|VEED]] | Easy online editing | $12/mo |
| [[link:/tools/201|Pictory]] | Text-to-video | $19/mo |
| [[link:/tools/9|Runway]] | Advanced effects | $12/mo |

---

## Our Recommendations

- **Beginners & social media**: Start with [[link:/tools/51|VEED]]
- **Content repurposing**: Use [[link:/tools/201|Pictory]]
- **Advanced creators**: Try [[link:/tools/9|Runway]]

Ready to revolutionize your video editing workflow? Try these AI tools today!

For more insights, check out [[link:/blog/best-ai-video-tools-2026-pictory-veed|Best AI Video Tools with Pictory & VEED]]
